finding: estimate omits the 12px Row wrapper padding that measureElement measures → every unseeded row corrects ~12px on first scroll (the exact jank targeted)
CARD_BASE excludes the Row py-1.5 (12px) but measureElement wraps <Row>, systematic estimate→measured jump
memo(Row) is defeated (renderCard builds a fresh element each render) and ConversationCard is not memoized → every visible card re-renders on each scroll frame
unlike MessageList (memoized ChatMessage) the row card is not memoized, so scroll re-renders recompute dayjs.fromNow/usePermission/useNavigate per row
docstring/default width (864, px-4/32) copied from the message estimator but rows use px-3 (24px gutter → 872)
monotonic message_count test picked data where both branches compute 96px (96>=96 trivially true; proves nothing)
memoization test only asserted a==b (any pure fn passes), never verified per-bucket independence
TEST-6 reset the counter before scrolling to an un-primed offset and asserted an arbitrary <=6, folding in the mount measurement burst instead of isolating the idle jank signal
TEST-5 hardcoded a scroll offset (index*90) that did not actually place the target deep card in the window → false assertion (caught by running it)
footer copy not singularized → 'Showing 1 of 1 conversations' (pre-existing string moved in this diff)
scrollMargin (planned in ITEM-4/DEC-6) omitted
gallery drives VirtualizedConversationList directly rather than the full ConversationList chrome
no reactive store proxy read inside .map()/loop — selectedIds/isSelectionMode captured at top level (clean)
no data-fetch/permission/exposure change (clean)
ResizeObserver + flushTimer are disconnected/cleared on unmount; the unmount flush uses widthRef (last-known-good) — no leak (clean, mirrors MessageList)
null getScrollElement, empty conversations, and missing row at index are all guarded (null-return, EMPTY_SEED, `if(!conversation) return null`) — no throw path (clean)
seed freeze/reset on count 0 handles conversation-set switch; getItemKey by id keeps measured heights across append/prepend; no store mutation (clean)
aria-live status preserved; rows keep ConversationCard role/tabindex; off-window unmount is the accepted virtualization tradeoff (no NEW violation)
desktop virtualize / mobile-nativeScroll plain-render split keyed on the stable flag; 390px narrow gallery variant registered (clean)
card hover-reveal delete / click-navigate / selection still work inside the absolute-positioned virtual row (group hover + z-10 intact) (clean)
VirtualizedConversationList props (conversations/renderCard/getScrollElement/scrollerReady/virtualize/footer) are typed and consumed consistently (clean)
